creator: me@niklaas.eu
text:
Although this really goes beyond my skills, I tried to create an updated version of the port (just following the patterns that I saw). So far it's not working but I thought I should share my changes so someone else can continue the work (I won't have time the next two weeks). Have a look at this diff: http://sprunge.us/NNOH

There are still a lot of mistakes in there (I just saw that PORTSREVISION should be deleted) but maybe this will get us somewhere in the end.
